name: mi-ecommerce-back
description: Backend de producción para Mi-Ecommerce (SonTerry Accesorios)

scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test MONGO_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/mi-ecommerce-test JWT_SECRET=test_jwt_secret JWT_EXPIRES_IN=1d REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET=test_refresh_secret REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN=7d jest --runInBand --detectOpenHandles
scripts.test:watch: cross-env NODE_ENV=test MONGO_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/mi-ecommerce-test JWT_SECRET=test_jwt_secret JWT_EXPIRES_IN=1d REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET=test_refresh_secret REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN=7d jest --watch
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env NODE_ENV=test MONGO_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/mi-ecommerce-test JWT_SECRET=test_jwt_secret JWT_EXPIRES_IN=1d REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET=test_refresh_secret REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN=7d jest --coverage
